items.preprocessing: 7/7 - Implements full preprocessing: configurable downsampling to max_dim (scale returned for coordinate mapping), Gaussian blur with odd-kernel enforcement, selectable background subtraction (morph/mean/none) with kernel sizing, and optional normalization. Designed explicitly for very large images via downsampling.
items.coarse_detection: 5/7 - Contains key building blocks: adaptive/otsu/percentile thresholding, largest contour selection, minEnclosingCircle, moments-based estimate, optional ellipse fit, and an edge-based fallback. However, the Hough-circle function is truncated/incomplete in provided code, and the actual coarse_detect/coarse_detect_multi_threshold wrapper implementations are not shown here, so end-to-end robustness/scale mapping can’t be fully verified from the snippet alone (though main.py does handle scale mapping after fine stage).
items.fine_detection: 4/7 - Implements multi-angle radial sampling (scan_all_angles), computes 1D gradients and uses a dual-edge strategy (positive vs negative peak) aimed at selecting the inner edge. However, the implementation is incomplete/buggy in the provided excerpt (_find_inner_edge_from_profile ends with a truncated return: 'return r_edge, ma'), and sub-pixel refinement is not evident in the shown code (sampling uses nearest-neighbor indexing rather than interpolation).
items.statistical_analysis: 4/7 - fine_detection imports robust-stat functions (MAD/outlier filtering, RANSAC, circle fitting, outlier/high-intensity point detection), and main.py reports inlier radius summaries, implying robust estimation exists. But statistical_analysis.py content is not provided, so explicit confirmation of MAD + 3-sigma and how radius is finalized cannot be fully verified from the excerpt.
items.mask_generation: 4/7 - Clear circular and ring mask generation implemented (hard and optional soft edge). Chord-adaptive cropping functions exist (bounds and apply mask), but chord detection itself and feature extraction (chord midpoints/high-intensity/outlier points) are not shown in this file excerpt; chord_adaptive_mask is truncated, so end-to-end chord-adaptive mask generation and feature point detection can’t be confirmed.

eval_report.comment: Good — solid implementation with minor gaps.
